## Meeting Purpose

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jessica to draft content strategies for Logic (due Tuesday EOD) and Auto, focusing on 4-5 topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/HF_1ETUkLLkc-WLuGujA6KDPgrLR5uzg?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [GrowthX uses a rapid 2-day content strategy process, emphasizing flexibility and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/HF_1ETUkLLkc-WLuGujA6KDPgrLR5uzg?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Weekly client timeline: Wk1-Kickoff, Wk2-Strategy, Wk3-Ideation/Calendar, Wk4-Calibration content](https://fathom.video/share/HF_1ETUkLLkc-WLuGujA6KDPgrLR5uzg?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)

## Topics

### Current Client Work Status

  - [Jessica has worked on 4-5 clients so far](https://fathom.video/share/HF_1ETUkLLkc-WLuGujA6KDPgrLR5uzg?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

### GrowthX Content Strategy Process

  - [Rapid 2-day development vs. traditional 2-3 week agency timelines](https://fathom.video/share/HF_1ETUkLLkc-WLuGujA6KDPgrLR5uzg?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Utilizes AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) to assist in strategy creation](https://fathom.video/share/HF_1ETUkLLkc-WLuGujA6KDPgrLR5uzg?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Flexible approach: guidelines provided but adaptable based on experience](https://fathom.video/share/HF_1ETUkLLkc-WLuGujA6KDPgrLR5uzg?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Key components: goals, 4-5 topic clusters, competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/HF_1ETUkLLkc-WLuGujA6KDPgrLR5uzg?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Preference for new content over refreshes during Sprint phase](https://fathom.video/share/HF_1ETUkLLkc-WLuGujA6KDPgrLR5uzg?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
